description_long: This charging station features a tall, rectangular body with a wood-textured finish and a metallic base. A black vertical panel near the top displays a white lightning bolt symbol, indicating its function as a charging point. A prominent black metal handle or cable holder runs vertically along the front and side, suggesting a place to hang or secure a charging cable. The overall design is sleek and modern, with clean lines and a minimalist aesthetic. The station appears robust and is likely intended for outdoor or semi-outdoor urban environments. No visible screens, connectors, or payment interfaces are present on the exterior.
description: A tall, wood-finished charging station with a black lightning bolt symbol and a vertical metal handle or cable holder, featuring a modern, minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view shows the lightning bolt symbol, black panel, and the full length of the vertical metal handle or cable holder.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the slim profile, the protruding top section, and the curvature of the metal handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the plain wood-textured surface and the back of the metal handle, with no visible symbols or panels.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlights the angled top and the attachment points of the metal handle.
attribute_branding_or_logo: A white lightning bolt symbol is present on a black panel near the top front, medium size, simple style.
